The Fleet

Premium vehicles, meticulously maintained

From Cadillac Escalades and Mercedes S-Class sedans to Sprinter executive vans, minibuses, and motorcoaches — for parties of 3 to 57, every vehicle is detailed and safety-checked between every ride.

Book Now → (206) 595-9675
  • Since 2010
  • · Licensed & Insured
  • · 24/7 Availability
  • · SeaTac Specialists
  • · 3 Counties Served

The Fleet

Pick a vehicle. We'll handle the rest.

Online in under two minutes, or call dispatch — a human picks up, every hour of every day.

Established 2010Emerald City Limos

Premium chauffeur service for the Greater Seattle area — discreet, precise, and on time. Available 24/7.
